contributor: university of illinois at urbana-champaign library, urbana, il
description: Page Four FOR NEGRO AND WHITE WORKERS UNITY By IOOS KOVEES RECENT cases of white chauvinism Finnish affair New York City Lithuanian Chicago International Workers Order etc have again demonstrated how deepseated is this cancer in the working class planted there by the oppres sing class And how little is the effort on the part of most of our comrades to determinedly operate on this cancer For example the case of white chauvinism in the Lithuanian Cooperative restaurant in Chi cago where the members of that cooperative gave way to the antiNegro campaign con sciously prepared by the white bourgeoisie of that territory proves that there was no serious campaign before against white chauvinism What happened after The campaign against White chauvinism started But id did not go further than the territory where this concrete case happened except that a few articles were published in our press After the Finnish affair where a gang of white chauvinists were prepared to attack and throw out Negro comrades from the hall the Finnish Buro passed a strong resolution against white chauvinism and is prepared to carry on a real campaign not only in New York but all over the country among the
partof: the daily worker (chicago, ill.;new york, n.y.) 1924-1958
